Intelligent System Security (IS2) Lab

About

The Intelligent System Security (IS2) Lab is a research group led by Prof. Jingyi Wang affiliated with the College of Control Science and Engineering, Zhejiang University, Hangzhou, China. We mainly conduct research in the interdisciplinary fields of formal methods, software engineering, system security and machine learning, with a focus on providing reliability or security guarantees for practical large-scale Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems and Cyber-physical systems (CPSs) like autonomous driving cars, industrial control systems, recommendation systems, healthcare, etc. Our lab has established close collaborations with relevant topnotch teams from industry including Huawei, Alibaba Group, and Ant Group. We are also continuously publishing in top-tier software engineering, security and formal methods venues such as IEEE S&P, ICSE, TSE, ASE, and TACAS, which have won two ACM SIGSOFT Distinguished Paper Award at ICSE 2018/2020 and an ACM SIGSOFT Research Highlights Award in 2020.

  • [News! Jan 2022] One paper accepted by IEEE S&P 2022, congrats to Jialuo!
  • [News! Dec 2021] One paper accepted by ICSE 2022, congrats to Haibin!
